name: Hycroft Mining Holding Corporation
description: Hycroft Mining Holding Corporation is a US-based gold and silver development company, which owns the Hycroft Mine, one of the world's largest precious metals deposits. Located in the world-class mining region of Northern Nevada, the Hycroft Mine is an open-pit heap leach operation. The company is focused on completing its technical studies to transition the mine to a large-scale milling operation to process its vast sulfide mineral resources.
